---
title: "Get Halpern Human Impact Index"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

https://oceanhealthindex.org/resources/data/cumulative-human-impacts/

Del paper Cumulative impacts to global marine ecosystems projected to more than double by mid-century

https://knb.ecoinformatics.org/view/doi%3A10.5063%2FF18K77KZ


```{r setup}



library(sf)
library(raster)
library(tidyverse)
library(tmap)
library(terra)
library(exactextractr)
# Check and install required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "sf", "raster", "terra", "tmap", "exactextractr", "tidyverse"
)
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
  }
  require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}



regions <- tibble::tibble(
  name = c("San Jorge Gulf", "Beagle Channel", "Burdwood Bank", "North Scotia Sea", "South Scotia Sea", "Potter Cove", "Weddell Sea"),
  lon_min = c(-67.7, -68.58, -62, -45 , -53,  -58.73, -35),
  lon_max = c(-65.5, -68.19, -56, -38 , -46 , -58.62, -25),
  lat_min = c(-47. , -54.89, -55, -55 , -62 , -62.21, -78),
  lat_max = c(-45. , -54.79, -53, -48 , -55 , -62.25, -74)
)

# Create sf polygons
region_sf <- regions %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(geometry = list(st_polygon(list(matrix(
    c(lon_min, lat_min,
      lon_max, lat_min,
      lon_max, lat_max,
      lon_min, lat_max,
      lon_min, lat_min),
    ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE))))) %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = 4326)

# Halpern 2015
if(FALSE){
r <- rast("~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/cumulative_impact_2013.tif")
}
# Halpern 2025
r <- rast("~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/ssp245_current.tif")
crs(r)
# Transformar polígonos al CRS del raster
region_sf_r <- st_transform(region_sf, crs(r))
impact_stats <- exact_extract(
  r,
  region_sf_r,
  function(values, coverage_fraction) {
    v <- values[!is.na(values)]
    tibble(
      impact_mean = mean(v),
      sd   = sd(v),
      cv   = sd(v) / mean(v),
      n    = length(v)
    )
  }
)
region_sf <- bind_cols(region_sf, impact_stats)

region_sf <- region_sf %>%
  mutate(
    lat_mid = (lat_min + lat_max) / 2,
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    ci_low  = impact_mean - 1.96 * se,
    ci_high = impact_mean + 1.96 * se
  )
region_sf <- region_sf %>%
  arrange(lat_mid) %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name))

ggplot(region_sf, aes(x = name, y = impact_mean)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high),
    width = 0.15
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Region (ordered by latitude)",
    y = "Mean Human Impact Index",
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
#region_sf$impact_mean <- impact_means

# --- Reproject to Antarctic Polar Stereographic (EPSG:3031) ---
# region_sf_proj <- st_transform(region_sf, 3031)
# r_proj <- project(r, "EPSG:3031")
# poly_union <- st_union(region_sf_r) %>% st_transform(3031)
# r_mask <- mask(crop(r_proj, vect(poly_union)), vect(poly_union))
# writeRaster(r_proj, "~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/cumulative_impact_2013_proj.tif")
# r_proj <- rast("~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/cumulative_impact_2013_proj.tif")
  

# --- Mask raster to polygon union ---
poly_union <- st_union(region_sf_r) # %>% st_transform(3031)
r_mask <- mask(crop(r, vect(poly_union)), vect(poly_union))

r_crop <- crop(r, vect(region_sf_r))
potter_sf <- region_sf_r %>% 
  dplyr::filter(name == "Potter Cove")
potter_buf <- st_buffer(potter_sf, dist = 0.2 * units::set_units(10000, m))
r_potter <- crop(r, vect(potter_buf))

# --- tmap plot ---
tmap_mode("view")
tm_shape(r_mask) +
  tm_raster(palette = "viridis") +
  tm_shape(region_sf_r) +
  tm_borders()

#
#
#

# Impact values without geometry
impact_tbl <- region_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  dplyr::select(name, impact_mean)

# Manual mapping between network_info$site and descriptive names
name_map <- tibble::tibble(
  site = c(
    "BurdwoodBank",
    "GulfSanJorge",
    "PotterCove",
    "Std BeagleChannel",
    "Std Weddell Sea",
    "Std NorthernScotia",
    "Std SouthernScotia"
  ),
  name = c(
    "Burdwood Bank",
    "San Jorge Gulf",
    "Potter Cove",
    "Beagle Channel",
    "Weddell Sea",
    "North Scotia Sea",
    "South Scotia Sea"
  )
)

network_info <- readRDS("Data/network_info.rds")
network_info <- filter(network_info, !(site %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel","NorthernScotia","SouthernScotia")))

if(FALSE){
  # Asumiendo que los datos de 2015 ya estan en network_info
df_comparacion <- inner_join(impact_tbl, 
                             network_info %>% dplyr::select(name, impact_mean), 
                             by = "name")

ggplot(df_comparacion, aes(x = impact_mean.y, y = impact_mean.x)) +
  geom_point(color = "blue", size = 3) +
  # Agregamos etiquetas con los nombres de los sitios
  geom_text(aes(label = name), vjust = -0.8, size = 3) +
  # Línea de identidad (x=y): Si el punto está arriba, el impacto aumentó
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Correlación de Impacto",
    subtitle = "Puntos sobre la línea roja indican aumento de impacto",
    x = "Impacto 2015",
    y = "Impacto 2020"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

df_long <- df_comparacion %>%
  rename("2015" = impact_mean.y, "2020" = impact_mean.x) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("2015", "2020"), names_to = "Year", values_to = "Impact")

ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Year, y = Impact, group = name)) +
  geom_line(aes(color = name), size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = name), size = 3) +
  # Agregamos etiquetas a los lados para ver el ranking
  geom_text(data = df_long %>% filter(Year == "2015"), 
            aes(label = name), hjust = 1.1, size = 3) +
  geom_text(data = df_long %>% filter(Year == "2020"), 
            aes(label = name), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Cambio en el orden relativo de impacto",
       subtitle = "Si las líneas se cruzan, el ranking cambió") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") # Quitamos leyenda porque pusimos etiquetas
}

# Join descriptive names and impact values to network_info
if( "impact_mean" %in% names(network_info) ) {
  network_info <- network_info %>%
    dplyr::rename(impact_mean2015=impact_mean)  # Remove existing impact_mean to avoid duplication
}

if( "name" %in% names(network_info) ) {   # If descriptive names already exist
  network_info <- network_info %>%
    left_join(impact_tbl, by = "name")         
} else {
  network_info <- network_info %>%
    left_join(name_map, by = "site") %>%        # Add descriptive name
    left_join(impact_tbl, by = "name")         
}

# Save the networks
saveRDS(network_info, "Data/network_info.rds")
```
